tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
N.C.                     
Eenie meenie miney mo
                            
Catch a bad chick by her toe
                       
If she holla let her go

                        
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]                 
  She's indecisive, she can't decide[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                  
  She keeps on looking from left to right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]                 
  Girl, come a bit closer, look in my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]              
  Searching is so wrong, I'm Mr. Right[/tab]

                           
[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]                        
You seem like the type to love 'em and leave 'em[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]     
And disappear right after this song[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]                    
So give me the night to show you, hold you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]     
Don't leave me out here dancin' alone[/tab]

                       
[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.                   [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]          
You can't make up your mind, mind, mind, mind, mind[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]     
Please don't waste my time, time, time, time, time[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]      
I'm not tryna rewind, wind, wind, wind, wind[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]     
I wish our hearts could come together as one[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]       
Cause shorty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]       
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]       
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]          
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover, oh[/tab]

                        
[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]F[/ch]          
  Let me show you what you're missing, paradise[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]                                
  With me you're winning girl, you don't have to roll the dice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]F[/ch]
  Tell me what you're really here for[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                          N.C. 
Them other guys? I can see right through ya[/tab]

                           
[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]                        
You seem like the type to love 'em and leave 'em[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]      
And disappear right after the song[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]                    
So give me the night to show you, hold you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]     
Don't leave me out here dancin' alone[/tab]

                       
[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]      
Can't make up your mind, mind, mind, mind, mind[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]     
Please don't waste my time, time, time, time, time[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]      
Not tryna rewind, wind, wind, wind, wind[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]    
I wish our hearts could come together as one[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]       
Cause shorty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]      
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]       
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]          
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover, oh[/tab]

                                       
[Bridge]
N.C.                                                    
Eenie meenie miney moe, catch a bad chick by her toe
                                             
If she holla, if, if, if she holla let her go
                                                    
Eenie meenie miney moe, catch a bad chick by her toe
                                             
If she holla, la, la, la she holla let her go
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]       
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]      
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]       
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                     N.C.      
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]

                                       
[Chorus]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]       
You can't make up your mind, mind, mind, mind, mind[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]     
Please don't waste my time, time, time, time, time[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]      
I'm not tryna rewind, wind, wind, wind, wind[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]    
I wish our hearts could come together as one[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]        
Cause shorty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]      
Shawty is a eenie meenie miney mo lover[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
